title: eugenioides nicobaricum
intro: Eugenioides nicobaricum, also known as Nicobar olive or Nicobar Eugenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Eugenioides nicobaricum is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic formulations to promote overall well-being.
